note: char_<id>_sheet.png grid: row = facing (down/up/left/right), col = frame (idle, walk1, walk2, walk3). Each cell is frame_w x frame_h with feet at the bottom of the cell. right column is a mirror of left. Single-frame char_<id>.png (down/idle) is kept for V1 compatibility; Look V2's slicer should read this manifest to build SpriteFrames from the sheet instead of guessing.

enemy_sheets.note: char_<id>_sheet.png for enemies is a single row: idle1, idle2 (bob), hurt (flash/knockback pose), die (squash/fade pose). Frame size matches the enemy's own char_<id>.png size.
